casa-verde.title: Casa Verde
casa-verde.subtitle: Engaging customized SMART building and construction technologies developed by PCL, we are implementing our award-winning Job Site Insights on this project including, for example, concrete curing sensors

sections.head: Client:
sections.body: Casa Verde

sections.head: Location:
sections.body: Jeddah (Saudi Arabia)

sections.head: cutting-edge technologies, collaborative thinking
sections.body: Interior design in architecture companies involves the creation of functional and aesthetically pleasing interior spaces within buildings. Interior designers work closely with architects and clients to understand the purpose and requirements of the space and then develop design concepts that reflect the client's needs and preferences while also adhering to building codes and regulations. Interior design in architecture companies may involve the selection of materials, furnishings, and lighting to create a cohesive design scheme that enhances the overall aesthetic of the space. ![](https://dsccsaudia.com/assets/uploads/media-uploader/approch1694255507.jpg)

sections.head: cutting-edge technologies, collaborative thinking 2
sections.body: Interior design in architecture companies involves the creation of functional and aesthetically pleasing interior spaces within buildings. Interior designers work closely with architects and clients to understand the purpose and requirements of the space and then develop design concepts that reflect the client's needs and preferences while also adhering to building codes and regulations. Interior design in architecture companies may involve the selection of materials, furnishings, and lighting to create a cohesive design scheme that enhances the overall aesthetic of the space.

sections.head: **Solutions** implemented for project :
sections.body: Aluminum & Steel Glazing System Products HVAC System Linen Chute Solution Window & Door IT System Swimming Pool System Bathroom Solutions Audio/Video System Decoration and Artwork Audio/Video System

casa-verde.solutions: Aluminum & Steel Glazing System Products HVAC System Linen Chute Solution Window & Door IT System Swimming Pool System Bathroom Solutions Audio/Video System Decoration and Artwork Audio/Video System
